zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert Hill於1503年7月21日出生在英國薩默塞特豪德斯同時，他的父親Giles Haile Hill34歲，母親Agnes Brent24歲。他於1525年之前與Margaret Fauntleroy結婚。他們至少是12個兒子和16個女兒的父母。他去世於1578年10月4日在英國英格蘭可瓦爾聖 馬比享年75歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭可瓦爾聖 馬比。

nameMeanings.name: Hill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived on or by a hill, from Middle English hill, hell, hull ‘hill’ (Old English hyll). Compare Hiller . This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English: possibly in some cases from the personal name Hille, a pet form of some name such as Hilger or Hillary .
German: from a short form of Hildebrand or any of a variety of other names, male and female, containing ancient Germanic hild ‘battle’ as the first element.

variants.name: Hillock
meanings: English and Scottish: topographic name for someone who lived ‘(by the) small hill’, from Middle English hillok, a diminutive of hille (Old English hyll ‘hill’). See Hill .

variants.name: Hills
meanings: English: variant of Hill with genitival -s if a relationship name, attested in Matilda Hilles, 1327 (Somerset), where the genitival form may signify widowhood; or with plural -s if habitational, attested in Johanne de Hyles, 1379 (Bickerstaffe, Lancashire), and Ricardo del Hyles, 1379 (Great Eccleston, Lancashire); or, with post-medieval excrescent -s, probably the most common form.

variants.name: Hiller
meanings: German: metronymic from Hille, a pet form of the female personal name Hildegund (see Hilke ).
German: from a masculine personal beginning with the ancient Germanic element hild ‘strife, battle’.

variants.name: Hil
meanings: Dutch (Van den Hil): topographic name from hil, hul ‘hill’, particularly in the sense of a flight hill above sea level in the southwestern Netherlands.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert Hill was born on 21 July 1503, in Houndstone, Somerset, England, his father, Giles Haile Hill, was 34 and his mother, Agnes Brent, was 24. He married Margaret Fauntleroy before 1525. They were the parents of at least 12 sons and 16 daughters. He died on 4 October 1578, in St Mabyn, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 75, and was buried in St Mabyn, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, England: Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert Hill est né le 21 juillet 1503, à Houndstone, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Giles Haile Hill, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Agnes Brent, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Fauntleroy avant 1525. Ils ont eu au moins 12 fils et 16 filles. Il est décédé le 4 octobre 1578, à St Mabyn, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterré à St Mabyn, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert Hill am 21. Juli 1503 in Houndstone, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Giles Haile Hill 34 und seine Mutter Agnes Brent 24. Er hat vor 1525 Margaret Fauntleroy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 12 Söhne und 16 Töchter. Er starb am 4. Oktober 1578 im Alter von 75 Jahren in St Mabyn, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom und wurde in St Mabyn, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Hill è nato il il 21 luglio 1503 nel Houndstone, Somerset, England, il suo padre, Giles Haile Hill, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Brent, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Fauntleroy prima del 1525. Erano genitori di almeno 12 figli e 16 figlie. Morì il 4 ottobre 1578, nel St Mabyn, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolto a St Mabyn, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Hillが1503年7月21日にイギリスソメルセトホーウンドストーンで生まれた時，父Giles Haile Hillは34歳，母Agnes Brentは24歳であった。1525年以前にMargaret Fauntleroyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも12人の息子と16人の娘の親であった。彼は1578年10月4日にイギリスイギリスコルンワルスト マブインで75歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスコルンワルスト マブインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Hill(이)가 1503년 7월 21일 영국 서머세트 허운드스톤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Giles Haile Hill(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Brent(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1525년 이전 Margaret Fauntleroy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 열 명 이상의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1578년 10월 4일 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 스트 마빈에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 스트 마빈에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Hill nasceu em 21 de julho de 1503, em Houndstone, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Giles Haile Hill, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Brent, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Fauntleroy antes 1525. Eles tiveram pelo menos 12 filhos e 16 filhas. Ele faleceu em 4 de outubro de 1578, em St Mabyn, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 75 anos, e foi sepultado em St Mabyn, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, England: стратфорд он авон, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert Hill родился 21 июля 1503 г. в местности хоундстоун, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Giles Haile Hill было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes Brent, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Fauntleroy перед 1525 г. У них было по крайней мере 12 сыновей и 16 дочерей. Он умер 4 октября 1578 г. в местности ст мабин, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 75 лет и был похоронен в местности ст мабин, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert Hill nació el 21 de julio de 1503, en Houndstone, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Giles Haile Hill, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Agnes Brent, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Margaret Fauntleroy antes de 1525. Fueron padres de por lo menos 12 hijos y 16 hijas. Murió el 4 de octubre de 1578, en St Mabyn, Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultado en St Mabyn, Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
